hooks.command: if [ -f "${HOME}/.claude/brain-config.json" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/pull.sh" --quiet --auto-merge && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-status.sh" || bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-status.sh" --error 'pull failed'; fi

if [ -f "${HOME}/.claude/brain-config.json" ]; then bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/push.sh" --quiet && bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-status.sh" || bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-status.sh" --error 'push failed'; fi
